goal: Deployability gauntlet for the only signal that cleared our honest statistical bar -- factors+candle (pooled net long-short Sharpe 1.76, positive in 3/3 splits, SIGN-K1 REAL). Decide whether it survives REAL A-share trading constraints or collapses to an in-sample artifact, by forcing it through three gates: (1) LONG-ONLY top-K market-excess, because A-shares mostly cannot be shorted, so the long-short is not directly tradable; (2) a REALISTIC A-share cost/constraint model (asymmetric stamp duty, commission, slippage, T+1, 10% price limits / un-enterable limit-up bars); (3) cross-period robustness (build 2023/2024 walk-forward windows from D1, liquidity haircut, top-K sensitivity) + a capacity estimate. HONEST EXPECTATION: long-only likely WEAKER (A-share short side often carries more signal via retail overreaction); this is a genuine go/no-go, not a victory lap. $0 (reuse D1 + candle/factor code).
env: Use .venv-xpu. D1 = data/processed/ashares_tushare_v1.parquet (OHLCV + pct_chg + amount + industry, 2022-2026). Reuse src/onset/candle_geometry + candle_pattern, src/train_tcn_wf (SPLITS, select_feature_columns, build_anchor_sequences), src/identify/neutral_targets, src/evaluation/onset_eval (clustered_bootstrap), src/onset/run_candle_ablation feature-building. wf_samples exist only for 2025 splits; for 2023/24 windows sample test anchors directly from D1.
acceptanceCriteria: verifyCommand (pytest tests/algo) passes

Method tasks ship a hermetic test (synthetic, <5s, CPU); REAL tasks gate on machinery-runs + committed stats.json under results/deploy/; findings (incl. a collapse to null) recorded, never gated (SIGN-R1)
All tradability metrics are LONG-ONLY top-K market-excess, NET of the realistic A-share cost model (SIGN-D1)
$0 new LLM cost

tasks.title: Long-only top-K market-excess metric
tasks.rationale: A-shares cannot be shorted; the tradable object is a long-only top-K basket and its EXCESS over the market (cross-sectional mean) per date.
acceptanceCriteria: long_only_excess(df, sig, ret='_fwd_r5', date='trade_date', k_frac=0.1) -> per-date (mean ret of top-K by sig) - (cross-sectional mean ret) = long-only market excess; series over dates
returns gross mean per-period, annualized Sharpe, and a date-block bootstrap 95% CI
hermetic synthetic test: a signal correlated with ret gives positive excess; random gives CI spanning 0
tasks.notes: DONE: src/onset/long_only.py (long_only_excess top-K minus market per date + summarize_excess with block CI, cost-aware). 3 hermetic tests green.

tasks.title: Realistic A-share cost / constraint model
tasks.rationale: Replace the crude 0.4%/period: A-share has asymmetric stamp duty (sell-only ~0.05% since Aug 2023), commission (~0.025%/side), slippage, T+1 (no same-day sell), and 10% price limits (cannot buy at limit-up).
acceptanceCriteria: round_trip_cost(commission=0.00025, stamp_sell=0.0005, slippage=0.0005) -> buy_cost + sell_cost (stamp on sell only); default ~0.2% round-trip
enterable(df, pct_chg='pct_chg', limit=9.8) -> boolean mask excluding would-be limit-up entries (cannot buy)
net_excess(gross_excess_series, round_trip) subtracts cost per holding period
hermetic test: cost lowers net; stamp applies to sell only; limit-up bars flagged un-enterable
tasks.notes: DONE: src/onset/ashare_cost.py (round_trip_cost ~0.2% stamp-on-sell-only; enterable excludes limit-up; net_excess). 3 hermetic tests green.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): factors+candle LONG-ONLY net-excess, all-split go/no-go
tasks.rationale: The decisive test. Does the factors+candle signal still produce a positive, cost-surviving LONG-ONLY market-excess across all splits once shorting is removed?
acceptanceCriteria: reuse run_candle_ablation feature-building to train factors+candle LGBM per split; predict each split's test anchors (exclude un-enterable limit-up entries via COST1)
report per-split AND pooled long-only net market-excess: mean/period, annualized Sharpe, clustered CI (LO1 + COST1)
writes results/deploy/long_only.json; hermetic smoke green; real run executed + committed; go/no-go verdict (SIGN-D1) recorded in progress.md
tasks.notes: DONE+REAL. FINDING: LONG-ONLY survived. pooled net market-excess Sharpe 1.10, mean +0.71%/period, CI [+0.0011,+0.0138] EXCLUDES 0; per-split net mean +1.17%/+0.52%/+0.45% = positive 3/3 (only split1 individually significant). PASS go on LO gate; full deployable verdict pending ROB1 cross-period. long_only.json committed.

tasks.title: REAL ($0): cross-period (2023/24) + liquidity + top-K robustness
tasks.rationale: Only one 2025 period so far. Build 2023 and 2024 walk-forward windows from D1; add a liquidity haircut (trade only liquid names) and top-K sensitivity.
acceptanceCriteria: define 2023 and 2024 train/test windows; sample test anchors from D1 (valid fwd_r5); re-evaluate factors+candle long-only net-excess
liquidity haircut: restrict to top-liquidity names by amount; top-K sensitivity k in {0.05, 0.1, 0.2}
writes results/deploy/robustness.json; hermetic smoke green; real run + committed; whether the edge holds across years recorded
tasks.notes: DONE+REAL. KILL SHOT: the 2025 long-only edge does NOT hold cross-period. 2023 net Sharpe -0.37, 2024 -0.36 (both negative); liquid-only -0.32; topK {5,10,20%} all negative. holds_across_years=FALSE. The 2025 result was period-specific. robustness.json committed.

tasks.title: Capacity estimate (ADV-based)
tasks.rationale: How much capital before the edge decays? Estimate from the average daily traded value (amount) of the top-K names and a participation cap.
acceptanceCriteria: capacity(top_names_adv, participation=0.05, k_names) -> rough max capital (sum of participation*ADV across the basket)
hermetic test on synthetic ADV
tasks.notes: Reads amount (turnover value) from D1 in the real path; the function itself is pure.

tasks.title: Deployability verdict + synthesis
tasks.rationale: Aggregate LO2 + ROB1 + CAP1 into the final deployability verdict + table + figure.
acceptanceCriteria: reads results/deploy/* -> results/deploy/summary.md + paper/sections/figures/deploy_summary.png

verdict (SIGN-D1): DEPLOYABLE only if long-only net-excess pooled CI excludes 0 AND >=2/3 splits positive AND holds across >=1 additional year; else 'statistically-real-but-not-tradable' or 'collapsed'
hermetic smoke green; real run + committed
